About Coin

What Makes $HINU Token Unique?

With pepe meme coins saturating the crypto market, Eiko founded $HINU Coin on behalf of those craving a fun alternative.

Deflationary Supply

50% of all platform fees collected from the upcoming HuskyInu Exchange and DEX will be used to buy and burn HuskyInu Tokens, which will reduce the circulating HuskyInu

Charity Voting

5% of the total HuskyInu SOL Token supply will be allocated to community rewards and charity, supporting user-voted charities and goodwill causes

Fast Transactions

HuskyInu leverages the speed and scalability of the Solana Blockchain to bring users transactions costing less than 1 penny with 400 millisecond block times.

HuskyInu Earn App

Utilize the HuskyInu Earn Phone App to start earning HuskyInu daily by simply; watching videos, viewing ads and sharing posts on social media.

Deflationary Supply

50% of all platform fees collected from the upcoming HuskyInu Exchange and DEX will be used to buy and burn HuskyInu Tokens, which will reduce the circulating HuskyInu

5% of the total HuskyInu SOL Token supply will be allocated to community rewards and charity, supporting user-voted charities and goodwill causes.

Fast Transactions

HuskyInu Earn App

Utilize the HuskyInu Earn Phone App to start earning HuskyInu daily by simply; watching videos, viewing ads and sharing posts on social media.

$HINU Journey

RoadMap

$HINU is on a journey to dominate the meme coin space. This roadmap showcases our exciting plans to bring utility, value, and fun to the crypto community.

  • Concept Development
  • Social Media Setup
  • Presale Marketing Campaign
  • Community Building
  • Core community members group
  • Media Coverage
  • Tech Development
1
  • Token Launch
  • 5,000+ Holders

  • Influencer Partnerships
  • Staking and Yield Farming
  • Global Marketing Campaigns

  • 35+ CEX Listings

  • High-Profile Partnerships
  • Regular Updates and AMA Sessions
  • Husky Inu App/Exchange Launch

$HINU Buy Process

How To buy

$HINU is currently available for purchase on select DEXs. We recommend following a step-by-step guide shown below.

Step 1

Connect wallet

Head to the top of this page to find the presale widget. Connect your wallet from a variety of available options to get started. If you are not able to connect, please reach out to us on our official Telegram channel.

Step 2

Select Network

After connecting your wallet, you can opt to join the $HINU presale on Solana chain. Buy either with native currency, or with BTC, ETH, BNB, LTC, DOGE, TRX, DASH, BCH or USDT on Ethereum, tron chains.

Step 3

Buy Tokens

Specify the amount of BTC, ETH, BNB, LTC, USDT, DOGE, TRX, DASH, or BCH you’d like to trade for $HINU, and then approve the transaction in your wallet. You will not receive tokens immediately during the presale. But you can claim them after the presale.

Frequently Asked Questions

Tortor at risus viverra adipiscing at in tellus integer.

Husky Inu is the best friend of Shiba Inu, adding more utility and value for holders by leveraging the power of Solana. This new cryptocurrency aims to build a supportive community with innovative features and enhanced rewards.

Husky Inu plans to launch its own Earn App and Decentralized Exchange. The Earn App will reward users with Husky Inu tokens for completing mini-tasks such as liking, reposting, and sharing content. The Decentralized Exchange will facilitate decentralized trading, enhancing the utility and value for Husky Inu holders.

Yes, we ensure the safety of our users. Detailed audit reports can be found on the top of our website, providing transparency and assurance of our security measures.

You will receive your $HINU tokens at the end of the presale period. For more detailed information, please click here

Yes, we're here to help! Kindly reach out to our live support from here. You can also email us at contact@thehuskyinu.com and await a response.

Currently, tokens are in the presale stage and are not available to claim. You will be able to claim them after all presale stages end. There will be 8 presale stages

The timer presents a countdown to the next price increase in the presale stage. However, if the fundraising goal is not reached within the given time, the timer resets until the goal is met. For more information, please visit our blog.
